options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: VictoryCondition
options.description: Choose victory condition. Defeat the Rival at the end of Gym Leader Castle, clear Poké and Prime Master Ball Cups, or both.

options.name: BaseStatTotalRandomness
options.description:
Controls the level of randomness for Pokemon BST. Stat distribution per Pokemon will follow a randomly selected distribution curve.
The higher the selection, the more extreme a curve you may see used. 
Stat changes are universal. Rental Pokemon and enemy trainer team Pokemon use the same BSTs.
Vanilla - No change
Low - 3 distribution types
Medium - 4 distribution types
High - 5 distribution types

options.name: Trainersanity
options.description: Toggle on to make all Trainers into checks. This option is off by default.

options.name: GymCastleTrainerRandomness
options.description:
Controls the level of randomness for the enemy team and movesets in Gym Leader Castle.
Vanilla - No change
Low - Movesets have a status, STAB, and higher attack stat aligned move. (4th move is fully random)
Medium - Movesets have a STAB, and higher attack stat aligned move. (3rd and 4th moves are fully random)
High - Movesets have a higher attack stat aligned move. (all other moves are fully random)

options.name: RentalListShuffle
options.description:
Controls whether the rental pokemon list is randomized or not
Instead of going in dex order, the rental tables will be shuffled

Off - No change
On - All tables shuffled
Manual: Select which tables are shuffled

options.name: RentalListShuffleGLC
options.description:
Controls whether the rental pokemon list for the Gym Leader Castle is randomized or not
Instead of going in dex order, the rental tables will be shuffled
This option only matters if RentalListShuffle is set to Manual mode.
Default is set to On

Off - No change
On - All tables shuffled

options.name: RentalListShufflePokeCup
options.description:
Controls whether the rental pokemon list for the Poke Cup is randomized or not
Instead of going in dex order, the rental tables will be shuffled
This option only matters if RentalListShuffle is set to Manual mode.
Default is set to On

Off - No change
On - All tables shuffled

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
